title: Crelloci Girls Play Sand Set Ice Cream & Sweet Cakes, Includes Magnetic Sand Molds and Tools, Dessert Shop Pretend Play Sandbox Kit, Play Sand Art Kits Sensory Toys Gift for Kids Age 3-5 | 1.1lbs
features: 🍰The Ice Cream and Cake Sand Kit is a delightful playtime experience that combines the fun of sand with the creativity of dessert-making. This set includes 1.1lbs vibrant, moldable magical sand in various colors, allowing children to sculpt their own ice cream cones and delicious cakes.

🧁With the Ice Cream and Cake Play Sand Set, kids can unleash their imagination and design mouthwatering treats. The set comes with an array of molds and tools, including 3 ice cream cone and 5 cake molds, spoons, and spatula, enabling children to create their own unique and delectable sand creations.

🍨The coloured sand in this set is specially formulated to have a unique texture that makes it easy to shape and mold, providing a sensory experience that is both satisfying and engaging. Its non-toxic and hypoallergenic properties ensure safe and worry-free playtime for children.

🍦The Ice Cream and Cake Play Sand Set is not just a fun activity for kids, but also a great way to enhance their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. As children manipulate and shape the sand, they develop important skills while having a blast.

🍧Easy to clean up and store, this ice cream play sand kit is a parent's dream. The sand is designed to stick to itself, making it easy to gather and put away after playtime. The set also comes with a simple plastic container, keeping all the molds and tools organized and ready for the next play session. Bring the joy of ice cream and cake into the world of magnetic sand with this delightful set.
